Defendants Bank Of America, N.A., Successor By Merger To Bac, Reconstrust Company, N.A.'S Demurrer To 1st Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Jan-19-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Clayton Gaddis, Attorney at Law, 415-398-3344, for defendant and moving party Bank of America. No other appearances.

The moving party appeared. There are no other appearances. the Court having reviewed the pleadings adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Defendants Bank Of America, N.A., Successor By Merger To BAC, Reconstrust Company, N.A.'S Demurrer To 1st Amended Complaint is sustained with leave to amend within 10 days. Order signed in open court. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay. Not reported.

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-12-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANTS BANK OF AMERICA, N.A., SUCCESSOR BY MERGER TO BAC, RECONSTRUST COMPANY, N.A.'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Continued to January 19, 2012 at 9:30 am in Department 501. Moving party is directed to comply with Local Rule 2.6C and provide a copy of the First Amended Complaint to Department 501 by January 12, 2012 at 4:00 pm. Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR 7077

MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. CLAYTON GADDIS OF SEVERSON & WERSON, TEL. NO. 677-5574 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Defendant Bank of America's demurrer to complaint is sustained with ten days leave to amend. No opposition filed. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077 =(302/HEK)
